What We Do

Core Capabilities

Integrated logistics services engineered to support complex supply chains with consistency, precision, and operational control.

Transport Operations

Linehaul, metropolitan, and dedicated fleet services across all major corridors and regional networks. Reliable, time-critical delivery backed by real-time visibility.

Warehousing &
Distribution

Purpose-built warehousing facilities with scalable capacity, inventory management systems, and pick-and-pack capabilities for high-volume throughput.

Fleet Management

Owned and managed fleet with telematics, preventive maintenance programs, and full compliance management designed for national-scale operations.

Supply Chain Solutions

Full supply chain consulting, optimisation, and management. Custom solutions designed to reduce cost and improve service levels across your network.

Our Fleet

Built for Every Corridor

A purpose-built, nationally compliant fleet operating across every major Australian freight corridor — delivering reliability, presentation, and performance at every touchpoint.

Interstate Linehaul

Scheduled & Dedicated Linehaul Services

High-capacity freight movement connecting all major interstate corridors on scheduled and dedicated run options — with full load visibility, compliance management, and DIFOT reporting across every movement.

National

National Freight Network

Reliable freight services across all primary Australian corridors with managed transit times and full shipment visibility from origin to destination.

Metro

Metropolitan Distribution

Flexible metro delivery capability across all capital cities — time-critical, high-frequency distribution with real-time ETA visibility and proof of delivery.

Last Mile

Last Mile & Final Delivery

Customer-facing delivery solutions for retail, commercial, and industrial clients — on-time, compliant, and presented to the standard your customers expect.

National Presence

Our Network

A purpose-built distribution network connecting Australia's five major metropolitan centres across every primary freight corridor — designed for national scale, operated with local precision.

Warehousing Network

Strategically positioned facilities in Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Adelaide, and Perth — providing scalable storage, cross-docking, and distribution across all major markets.

National Linehaul Corridors

Scheduled and dedicated linehaul connecting all five metro hubs with reliable transit times, managed load plans, and end-to-end freight visibility.

24/7 Operational Coverage

Around-the-clock operations across all nodes, with dedicated teams managing freight movement, exception handling, and client reporting in real time.

Port & Wharf Connectivity

Direct port access and wharf cartage at each metro location, integrating import and export container movements at all major Australian ports.

International Freight

Import & Export Services

Integrated import and export logistics — from port pickup and container handling through to warehousing, destuffing, repacking, and final delivery. Engineered for enterprise-scale cargo operations with full compliance and real-time visibility.

Wharf Cartage

Full-spectrum import and export container movements from all major Australian ports. Our NHVR-compliant fleet of prime movers, sideloaders, and flat-tops covers 20ft and 40ft containers through to overweight, refrigerated, and specialised cargo — with GPS visibility at all times.

Container Destuff & Pack

Professional container destuffing and packing at our purpose-built facilities across all metro hubs. Cargo is unloaded, inspected, sorted, and palletised to specification. Full container repacking and export load consolidation available for outbound shipments of all types.

Port-to-Door Delivery

Seamless container pickup from terminal, cartage to our facilities for destuff or direct delivery, and final-mile distribution to warehouse, retail, or end-customer locations. Full freight visibility from port gate to delivery confirmation throughout.

Dangerous Goods Handling

Certified handling of dangerous goods and hazardous cargo in compliance with the Australian Dangerous Goods Code and all relevant state and federal regulations. Trained operators manage packaging, segregation, documentation, and transport for all DG classifications.

Cross-Docking & Consolidation

High-speed cross-docking at key metro nodes allows rapid transfers between transport modes without intermediate storage. LCL and FCL consolidation services reduce freight costs for clients managing multiple import or export consignments.

Cargo Reporting & Visibility

Real-time container tracking, customs milestone updates, and delivery confirmation integrated into a client-facing reporting dashboard. Full audit trails and proof-of-delivery documentation available for every movement across the network.

Compliance & Accreditations

NHVR mass management accreditation across all states
Australian Border Force (ABF) compliant operations
AQIS biosecurity procedures at all facilities
ADG Code certified for dangerous goods cartage
ISO quality management systems across all sites
Full cargo insurance and liability cover available

For complex import and export requirements, container handling projects, or ongoing wharf cartage arrangements — speak to our international freight team.

Intelligent Freight

Technology &
AI-Powered Operations

Haulix integrates advanced logistics technology and autonomous AI systems into the core of our freight operations — giving enterprise clients real-time visibility, automated decision-making, and a supply chain that responds faster than the market moves.

01

Autonomous Freight Orchestration

AI agents operate continuously across our freight network — automatically allocating loads, adjusting run sequences, selecting optimal carrier combinations, and rerouting around delays without manual intervention. Freight decisions that once took hours happen in seconds.

02

Live Visibility & Predictive Alerting

Every consignment tracked in real time across the entire network. Intelligent monitoring surfaces exceptions before they become delays — alerting operations teams and triggering automated contingency actions when freight deviates from plan.

03

System Integration Layer

Deep integration with your ERP, WMS, and procurement platforms through a purpose-built API layer. Our systems connect directly into your environment — providing two-way data flows, automated booking triggers, and a single source of truth across your supply chain.

04

Intelligent Reporting & Analytics

Machine-generated performance dashboards deliver DIFOT tracking, cost-per-movement analysis, carrier benchmarking, and exception root cause reports. Scheduled and on-demand reporting available directly into your preferred business intelligence tools.

Our Commitment

Acting Sustainably

Haulix is committed to reducing the environmental impact of freight through smarter operations, cleaner fleet investment, and measurable emissions reduction — building a logistics network designed for the future.

Emissions Reduction

Reducing diesel fuel emissions across our fleet through route optimisation, load efficiency, and investment in low-emission vehicles. Measurable reductions are tracked and reported against annual targets across all operations.

Clean Energy & Infrastructure

Transitioning our facilities to renewable energy including solar power, smart LED lighting, and energy-efficient warehouse systems. Our distribution centres are designed with sustainability built in — from construction to ongoing operations.

ESG Reporting & Transparency

Providing enterprise clients with emissions data, freight efficiency reporting, and supply chain carbon visibility to support their sustainability commitments and ESG reporting obligations across Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions.

↓CO₂ Annual Reduction Target
Solar Facility Power
Net Zero Long-Term Goal

Ready to meet your organisation's sustainability requirements with a logistics partner that treats ESG as a core operational commitment — not an afterthought.
